conditions: Closest 4ft piling at far right is clear with texture. The 11ft piling just left of it is visible but hazy; the 14ft/30ft pilings toward center-left are only very faint broad shadows with no detail. This corresponds best to conditions where the 14ft piling is a hazy silhouette and farther pilings are largely lost.
